assertions.text: Verifies branch is main/master and tree is clean, asks for bump type (patch/minor/major), and never auto-commits/pushes/tags
Creates release/vX.Y.Z branch, bumps package.json, syncs the lockfile, generates a CHANGELOG draft from git log, and proposes the commit waiting for confirmation
Does NOT trigger the release workflow; deployment/CI belongs to the vue-ssr-deployment skill
